articles.headline: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
articles.description: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Rice hails England's 'frightening' attacking substitutes
images.caption: Declan Rice reacts to England's 3-0 win over Costa Rica in their final friendly ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 win as Rice, Gordon, Watkins score
articles.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.

images.name: Declan Rice [1296x729]
images.caption: Declan Rice opened the scoring for England shortly after 10 minutes played.

images.name: Tuchel: England can't be World Cup favourites
images.caption: Thomas Tuchel says England can't be favourites because there are "proven winners" at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
articles.description: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

images.name: Burley questions if Portugal's Martinez would drop Ronaldo
images.caption: Craig Burley debates whether Roberto Martinez should drop Cristiano Ronaldo amid growing scrutiny over his place in Portugal's starting lineup.

articles.headline: Argentina wins as Messi scores in cameo in front of 88k in Alabama
articles.description: Argentine legend Messi, who is working his way back from muscle fatigue ahead of the start of the FIFA World Cup, came on in the 70th minute and scored from the penalty spot right after in his team's 3-0 win over Iceland.

images.name: Messi celeb Arg Iceland_260609 [1296x729]
images.caption: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.
images.alt: Lionel Messi celebrates after scoring a goal for Argentina in a friendly against Iceland.

images.name: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot
images.caption: Lionel Messi doubles Argentina's lead from the penalty spot

article.headline: Czechia thump Malta 7-1 in Euro 2024 warm-up
article.description: Czechia cruised past an overmatched Malta side 7-1 in their Euro 2024 warm-up match on Friday with Slavia Prague forward Mojmír Chytil scoring in each half for a team aiming to book a second straight quarter-final appearance.
article.linkText: Czechia thump Malta 7-1 in Euro 2024 warm-up

images.name: Czechia celeb vs. Malata_20240607 [1296x729]
images.alt: The team of Czechia celebrates after scoring the team's first goal during the international friendly match between Czechia and Malta at Untersberg-Arena on June 07, 2024 in Salzburg, Austria.

peers.name: Czechia celeb vs. Malata_20240607 [1296x518]
peers.alt: The team of Czechia celebrates after scoring the team's first goal during the international friendly match between Czechia and Malta at Untersberg-Arena on June 07, 2024 in Salzburg, Austria.

article.story:
Czechia cruised past an overmatched Malta side 7-1 in their Euro 2024 warm-up match on Friday with Slavia Prague forward Mojmír Chytil scoring in each half for a team aiming to book a second straight quarter-final appearance.

Czechia coach Ivan Hasek rested a number of key figures at the match in Grodig, Austria -- including West Ham United midfielder Tomás Soucek and Bayer Leverkusen forward Patrik Schick -- and instead blooded a number of less experienced players.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, NWSL more (U.S.)

Fiorentina's Antonín Barák opened the scoring for the Czechs in the sixth minute from the penalty spot before Chytil grabbed his first goal just before the break. David Jurasek, Ondrej Lingr, Matej Jurásek and Vaclav Cerny added to the Czechia tally while Paul Mbong pulled a goal back for Malta.

The Czechs kick off their Euro 2024 campaign on June 17 against Portugal in Leipzig before facing Turkey and Georgia in Group F. Czechia play North Macedonia on Monday in their final preparation match for the tournament in Germany.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Czechia 1, Malta 0. Antonín Barák (Czechia) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Kemar Reid (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Czechia 2, Malta 0. Mojmír Chytil (Czechia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Vladimír Coufal.
Substitution, Czechia. Vítezslav Jaros replaces Matej Kovár.
Substitution, Malta. Alexander Satariano replaces Kemar Reid.
Alexander Satariano (Malta) Substitution at 45'
Vitezslav Jaros (Czechia) Substitution at 45'
Goal!  Czechia 3, Malta 0. David Jurásek (Czechia) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.
Zach Muscat (Malta) Substitution at 49'
Substitution, Malta. Zach Muscat replaces Enrico Pepe because of an injury.
Martin Vitík (Czechia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Czechia. Ondrej Lingr replaces Antonín Barák.
Ondrej Lingr (Czechia) Substitution at 56'
Goal!  Czechia 4, Malta 0. Mojmír Chytil (Czechia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Vladimír Coufal with a cross.
Goal!  Czechia 4, Malta 1. Paul Mbong (Malta) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Zach Muscat with a through ball.
Substitution, Czechia. Václav Cerny replaces Tomás Chory.
Substitution, Czechia. Tomás Vlcek replaces Vladimír Coufal.
Substitution, Czechia. Matej Jurásek replaces David Jurásek.
Michal Sadílek (Czechia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Malta. Matías García replaces Steve Pisani.
Substitution, Malta. Juan Corbalan replaces Ryan Camenzuli.
Goal!  Czechia 5, Malta 1. Ondrej Lingr (Czechia) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal    following a set piece situation.
Teddy Teuma (Malta) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Malta. Jake Grech replaces Teddy Teuma.
Substitution, Malta. Kurt Shaw replaces Steve Borg.
Substitution, Czechia. Lukás Cerv replaces Mojmír Chytil.
Joseph Mbong (Malta) is shown the red card for violent conduct.
Lukás Cerv (Czechia) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Czechia 6, Malta 1. Matej Jurásek (Czechia) left footed shot from a difficult angle on the left to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Pavel Sulc.
Goal!  Czechia 7, Malta 1. Václav Cerny (Czechia) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Matej Jurásek with a cross   following a corner.
